ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height_cm" INTEGER /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weight_kg" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team participates in */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's stadium */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team's manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for which the stats are recorded */,
  "AB" INTEGER /* Number of at-bats */,
  "R" INTEGER /* Number of runs */,
  "H" INTEGER /* Number of hits */,
  "2B" INTEGER /* Number of doubles */,
  "3B" INTEGER /* Number of triples */,
  "HR" INTEGER /* Number of home runs */,
  "RBI" INTEGER /* Number of runs batted in */,
  "TB" INTEGER /* Total bases */,
  "AVG" REAL /* Batting average */,
  "SLG" REAL /* Slugging percentage */,
  "OBP" REAL /* On-base percentage */,
  "OPS" REAL /* On-base plus slugging */,
  "BB" INTEGER /* Number of walks */,
  "HBP" INTEGER /* Number of hit by pitch */,
  "SO" INTEGER /* Number of strikeouts */,
  "GDP" INTEGER /* Number of grounded into double plays */,
  "SF" INTEGER /* Number of sacrifice flies */,
  "SH" INTEGER /* Number of sacrifice hits */,
  "SB" INTEGER /* Number of stolen bases */,
  "CS" INTEGER /* Number of times caught stealing */,
  "IP" REAL /* Innings pitched */,
  "ERA" REAL /* Earned run average */,
  "WHIP" REAL /* Walks and hits per innings pitched */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date when the game was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the away team */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees at the game */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_stats" (
  "game_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game statistic record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "AB" INTEGER /* Number of at-bats in the game */,
  "R" INTEGER /* Number of runs in the game */,
  "H" INTEGER /* Number of hits in the game */,
  "2B" INTEGER /* Number of doubles in the game */,
  "3B" INTEGER /* Number of triples in the game */,
  "HR" INTEGER /* Number of home runs in the game */,
  "RBI" INTEGER /* Number of runs batted in the game */,
  "TB" INTEGER /* Total bases in the game */,
  "AVG" REAL /* Batting average in the game */,
  "SLG" REAL /* Slugging percentage in the game */,
  "OBP" REAL /* On-base percentage in the game */,
  "OPS" REAL /* On-base plus slugging in the game */,
  "BB" INTEGER /* Number of walks in the game */,
  "HBP" INTEGER /* Number of hit by pitch in the game */,
  "SO" INTEGER /* Number of strikeouts in the game */,
  "GDP" INTEGER /* Number of grounded into double plays in the game */,
  "SF" INTEGER /* Number of sacrifice flies in the game */,
  "SH" INTEGER /* Number of sacrifice hits in the game */,
  "SB" INTEGER /* Number of stolen bases in the game */,
  "CS" INTEGER /* Number of times caught stealing in the game */,
  "errors" INTEGER /* Number of fielding errors in the game */,
  "putouts" INTEGER /* Number of fielding putouts in the game */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of fielding assists in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
